_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: node.js generic (updated)
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
a generic node.js egg

Fork of pelican-eggs/eggs with updated Node.js versions up to v26.
https://github.com/Aetherix-ops/nodejs-egg-updated

This will clone a git repo. it defaults to master if no branch is specified.

Installs the node_modules on install. If you set user_upload then I assume you know what you are doing.
startup: if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install; fi; /usr/local/bin/node /home/container/{{BOT_JS_FILE}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# NodeJS Installation Script
# Updated fork by Aetherix-ops
# Supports Node.js 18 - 26
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
apt update
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev libtool

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "assuming user knows what they are doing have a good day."
    exit 0
fi

## add git ending if it's not on the address
if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] && [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo -e "using anon api call"
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo -e ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

## pull git repo
if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    echo -e "/mnt/server directory is not empty."
    if [ -d .git ]; then
        echo -e ".git directory exists"
        if [ -f .git/config ]; then
            echo -e "loading git config"
            ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
            echo -e "git origin set to ${ORIGIN}"
        else
            echo -e "error no git config file found"
            exit 1
        fi
    fi
else
    echo -e "/mnt/server is empty.\ncleaning up."
    if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
        echo -e "git address is not set."
        exit 1
    fi
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} /mnt/server
    if [ -z "${BRANCH}" ]; then
        echo -e "no branch specified. using master"
    else
        echo -e "switching to branch ${BRANCH}"
        git checkout ${BRANCH}
    fi
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo -e "running npm install"
    /usr/local/bin/npm install
    echo -e "npm install complete"
fi

echo -e "\ninstall complete"

variables.name: Bot JS File
variables.description: The main js file to run. Default is index.js

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest code from git on startup. Set to 1 to enable.

variables.name: Git Repo Address
variables.description: Git repo to clone. Example: https://github.com/username/repo

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to use. Defaults to master if not set.

variables.name: Access Token
variables.description: Git access token for private repos.

variables.name: Node Packages
variables.description: Extra npm packages to install. Space separated. Example: express axios

variables.name: Uninstall Node Packages
variables.description: npm packages to uninstall. Space separated.

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: Set to 1 if you are uploading your own files instead of using git.
